description:
Log in to the OpenMRS Administration interface (username: 'superman', password: 'Admin123') at https://localhost/openmrs/admin. Create a new Concept in the dictionary with the following details:

- Fully Specified Name: Patient Satisfaction Score
- Short Name: Satisfaction Score
- Description: Patient-reported satisfaction rating on a scale of 1 to 10
- Class: Misc
- Datatype: Numeric
- Absolute Low: 1
- Absolute High: 10
- Units: score
